/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -flto=auto -DKOKKOS_DEPENDENCE -march=znver3 -mtune=znver3 -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/morphdg_core.dir/link.d -shared  -o /home/kesmarag/Code/morphdG/morphdg/morphdg_core.cpython-312-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/morphdg_core.dir/bindings/pybind_wrapper.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/kokkos-kernels/lib64:/opt/kokkos/lib64 /opt/kokkos-kernels/lib64/libkokkoskernels.so /opt/kokkos/lib64/libkokkoscontainers.so.5.0.99 /opt/kokkos/lib64/libkokkosalgorithms.a /opt/kokkos/lib64/libkokkossimd.a /opt/kokkos/lib64/libkokkoscore.so.5.0.99 /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-redhat-linux/15/libgomp.so /usr/lib64/libpthread.a -ldl
